items.summary: INNOCN’s official Amazon storefront is offering its 49-inch 5K2K curved ultrawide gaming monitor for $499.99 shipped for Prime Day. This model originally carried an $875 price tag and has more recently been selling for around $795 at Amazon, making today’s offer a $295 discount from its usual going rate. It also lands it $40 below the previous all-time low we tracked for it during last year’s Black Friday sale. It delivers much of the same big-screen Samsung Odyssey experience without hitting the $1,000 mark, so it’s definitely worth considering if you’re on a tight budget.

items.summary: Now nearly half through the final day of Amazon’s 2026 Prime Day festivities, we are quickly side-stepping over to this afternoon’s Android game and app deals. Alongside the Google Play Mega Game Sale, highlights are many this week and we have now added titles like titles Kero Blaster, Muse Dash, Asdivine Hearts 2, AntVentor: Point & Click, Doom & Destiny Worlds, Soul Huntress, Nerd Survivors, What Lies Underground, and more. Time is winding down to score Pixel 10 now starting from $519, the Google TV Streamer 4K dropping even lower from $72, Amazon Echo Spot at $40 (50% off), and up to 39% off TCL NXTPAPER Android tablets from $140 as well as Lenovo models from $110. The apps await below.

items.title: Prime Day drops the Keurig K-Mini coffee maker to just $50 (Nearly 40% off)
items.summary:
Keurig K-Mini Mate Single Serve K-Cup Pod Coffee Maker

Buy for $50 (Reg. $80)

What we love

If you’re short on counter space but can’t live without your morning coffee, the Keurig K-Mini is an easy pick. At just $50, this compact single-serve brewer fits just about anywhere. It brews up to a 12-ounce cup in just minutes using your favorite K-Cup pods. It’s quick, easy to use, and doesn’t take up valuable kitchen space, making it one of our favorite budget-friendly coffee makers. At 38% off, this Prime Day price can’t be beat.

Here’s the thing though, you’ll need to get in there quick as various color/storage configurations are starting to sell out complete as Amazon, presumably preps, to re-launch its listings at the new, much higher price tag – you can score them at up to $350 off the new list prices.

items.title: Google’s Nest Wi-Fi Pro router has dropped further down to a new $85.50 all-time low for the final stretch of Prime Day
items.summary: As part of the ongoing Prime Day sale, Amazon is now offering Google’s Nest WiFi Pro 6E single-node mesh router in the Snow and Lemongrass finishes for $85.49 shipped. Those colors first dropped to $89.99 on day one of the event, but today’s deal knocks them further down by another $4.50 to mark a new all-time low. Normally $200, you’re now saving nearly $115 here. Only the Snow and Lemongrass variants have further dropped to the $86.50 mark, while the Linen model is still at $90. Head below for more details.

If you don’t have an easy way to top off your smartphone in the car, it’s hard to go wrong here. For just $8 Prime shipped you get a retractable USB-C solution that also sports backup Type-C and USB-A ports.
